migrations.description: Creates governance schema, GovernanceEvent table, governance event stored procedures, indexes, append-only trigger, and runtime role protections.
Creates durable ToolRequest table and stored procedures linked to GovernanceEvent.
Creates durable ToolGateDecision table and stored procedures linked to ToolRequest and GovernanceEvent.
Creates durable ApprovalDecision table and stored procedures linked to GovernanceEvent with scoped approval subjects.
Creates durable AcceptedApproval table and stored procedures for append-only accepted approval records.
Creates durable PolicySatisfaction table and stored procedures for append-only policy satisfaction records.
Creates durable PolicyDecisionEvent table and stored procedures linked to GovernanceEvent and optional request, gate, and approval evidence.
Creates durable DogfoodReceipt table and stored procedures linked to GovernanceEvent and optional governance evidence records.
Creates durable ThoughtLedgerGovernanceEventReference table and stored procedures linking ThoughtLedger entry IDs to GovernanceEvent records as evidence only.
Creates durable A2A AgentHandoff tables, stored procedures, append-only triggers, and evidence-only governance event linkage.
Creates durable WorkflowRun tables, stored procedures, append-only triggers, and evidence-only workflow run storage.
Adds durable WorkflowStep stored procedures, sequence metadata, verifier coverage, and evidence-only workflow step storage over the existing workflow step tables.
Creates durable WorkflowCheckpoint tables, stored procedures, append-only triggers, and evidence-only checkpoint storage.
Creates durable memory proposal staging tables, stored procedures, append-only triggers, and staging-only authority protections.
Creates durable workflow apply dry-run receipt table, stored procedures, append-only trigger, and receipt-only authority protections.
Creates durable controlled dry-run receipt table, stored procedures, append-only trigger, and evidence-only authority protections.
Creates durable PatchArtifact table, stored procedures, append-only trigger, and proposed-change-package-only authority protections.
Creates durable RollbackSupportReceipt table, stored procedures, append-only trigger, and rollback-support-only authority protections.
Creates durable SourceApplyDryRunReceipt table, stored procedures, append-only trigger, and dry-run-receipt-only authority protections.
Creates durable SourceApplyReceipt table, stored procedures, append-only trigger, and narrow-real-apply receipt authority protections.
Creates durable RollbackExecutionReceipt table, stored procedures, append-only trigger, and controlled rollback execution receipt authority protections.
Creates durable WorkflowTransitionRecord table, stored procedures, append-only trigger, and movement-receipt-only authority protections.
Creates durable ReleaseReadinessDecisionRecord table, stored procedures, append-only trigger, and release-readiness-decision-record authority protections.
DEMO-REHEARSAL-001: ProjectProfiles/ProjectCommands tables - required by builder readiness; a fresh demo database could not start a governed run without them.
DEMO-REHEARSAL-001: code index tables required by readiness and context assembly on a fresh database.
DEMO-REHEARSAL-001: Projects indexing status fields required by readiness on a fresh database. Catalog-agnostic since the USE landmine was removed.
DEMO-REHEARSAL-001: append-only agent run audit envelope store - the real critic persists durable reviews here.
Creates versioned project documents and adds backend-owned upload origin, processing, visibility, and file metadata required by DOCS-UPLOAD-1.
Adds durable Chat reply linkage so exact Ready document versions linked through ProjectDocumentLinks can be replayed against the assistant answer that used them.
Promotes the bounded project-channel schema into the runtime migration manifest for channel membership administration.
Adds project-specific visibility membership plus durable Work Item assignee, followers, waiting-on, and attributed collaboration activity.
Adds optimistic revisions to ticket drafts and channel memberships; Work Item collaboration already carries its revision.
Creates durable Work Item identity and versioned contract tables while preserving ticket-backed route compatibility.
Creates the append-only attribution ledger for authenticated user mutations, including actor, scope, trace, timestamp, and source client.
Moves Runs, RunEvents, semantic metadata, context documents, source references, and ticket compatibility columns from request-path schema creation into the controlled migration manifest.
Adds checked product-scope and typed-source foreign keys plus source, supersession, retrieval, audit-support, and retention indexes identified by the CLN-22 catalog audit.
Creates append-only stable Project Canon identities, governed versions, lifecycle tombstones, current-truth projection, and inspectable history.
Creates the append-only SQL-authoritative lifecycle ledger and validated transitions for rebuildable semantic/vector projections.
Adds atomic project-first Workbench startup state, leases, idempotent client operations, and outbox events without repository provisioning.
Adds the fenced Workbench Business Analyst run state machine, claim metadata, exactly-once assistant materialization, and durable operation result linkage.
Adds sanitized append-only Analyst preparation and fixed read-only snapshot-tool provenance bound to exact Workbench agent-run attempts.
Adds append-only safe provider invocation metadata bound to the exact Analyst preparation and run attempt, excluding prompts and completions.
Adds typed versioned project-understanding revisions, AgentRun provenance, explicit conflict materialization, and fenced project rename proposals.
Adds durable privacy-preserving audit records for deterministic Workbench slash-command rejections.
Adds trusted proposal-purpose AgentRun metadata plus current ticket proposal aggregates and append-only canonical revision history.
Adds immutable atomic permanent-ticket commitment receipts, exact proposal-to-ticket provenance, dependency mappings, and committed proposal revisions.
Adds repository binding and execution-profile authorities, immutable revisions, explicit setup confirmations, and LegacyUnverified LocalPath compatibility without provisioning files.
Adds durable controlled repository-provisioning attempts and immutable qualification receipts, exact setup-confirmation provenance, and operation result linkage.

Adds fenced production-sandbox qualification attempts, exact repository/profile/policy provenance, immutable evidence manifests, cleanup outcomes, and idempotent operation result linkage without changing project readiness.

Adds fenced technical-validation attempts, exact repository observations, restore/build/test/index/model evidence, a companion readiness ledger, and the mechanically current effective-readiness projection without Builder execution authority.

Adds authorization-free canonical Builder work-package cores with exact Work Item contracts, acceptance criteria, permitted files, readiness/index/model/sandbox snapshots, ordered provenance, and scoped single-use start authorizations without creating Builder runs or execution envelopes.
